findings.title: Empty Modified Capabilities short-circuit prose not explicitly tasked
findings.detail: The slash-command-guides spec requires the generated specflow.md to contain prose stating that when specflow-spec-verify reports reason:no_modified_capabilities the guide advances with spec_verified immediately. Task 4.2–4.6 cover the verify step prose generically but do not call out this short-circuit path as a distinct sub-task. The existing task granularity likely covers it implicitly via 4.6 (advance with spec_verified), but explicitly mentioning the no_modified_capabilities branch in 4.6 or as a sub-bullet would reduce ambiguity.

findings.title: Mermaid diagram refresh not tasked
findings.detail: Completion condition C6 mentions refreshing the Mermaid diagram if one exists in docs/. No task covers this. If a diagram exists it should be updated; if not, the condition is vacuous. Adding a conditional task or noting it in Task 1 would be cleaner, but this is non-blocking since the completion condition already flags it.
